specific_question: How effective are social media campaigns at encouraging new patients to sign up for MediConn accounts?
answer: During our last Facebook ad push, there was an increase of 10% in new patient sign-ups, 6% of which were referred directly to the MediConn site through Facebook ad links.
dr_question: With the rapid increase in virtual consultations for healthcare visits reported since 2023, what marketing strategies can MediConn Solutions adopt to continue attracting new customers?
